reason_for_decision: The article meets the pass threshold with a good function-placement lens, a realistic hybrid conclusion, and useful best-practice guidance for degraded conditions.
strengths: The article frames the choice as function placement instead of ideology, which is the right engineering lens.
It handles hybrid architecture honestly by separating edge continuity from centralized situational awareness.
The emphasis on degraded-communications testing makes the guidance more operational than diagrammatic.
summary_assessment: This article passes comfortably. It is structured well, gives practical architecture guidance, and offers a mature hybrid recommendation instead of a simplistic centralized-versus-distributed verdict.
